title: Shonnie Daniel
compiled_truth: Shonnie Daniel is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-06), Shonnie Daniel sent 89 and received 776 emails, totalling 865 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (85), [Mark Whitt](people/mark-whitt) (42), [Brian Bierbach](people/brian-bierbach) (38), [Cris Sherman](people/cris-sherman) (27), [Ranabir Dutt](people/ranabir-dutt) (19).
